scripts.build:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:build: npm run build:android && cd android && JAVA_HOME=${JAVA_HOME:-/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk} ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.apk: npm run apk:build && bash scripts/sign-apk.sh releases/cpr-helper-v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version").apk
